SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_MOLD_SW 
LABEL: 
Core HRSN Housing 2: Mold 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) core health related social need (HRSN) housing has mold. 
LONG NAME: SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_MOLD_SW 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 
COMMENT: 
Variables that start with “SR” include information for each screening.
